summary: Complete testing of MANDATORY 2FA Admin Login feature. All backend tests (11/11) passed. Frontend UI fully functional with correct flows for first-time setup and returning users. The admin login now ALWAYS requires 2FA - it never returns access_token directly.

minor.issue: Rate limiting (5/min) can cause test failures if run too quickly. This is expected security behavior.

seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Tests clean up 2FA state after completion.
context_for_next_testing_agent: MANDATORY 2FA Admin Login fully tested. Key behaviors verified: 1) POST /api/admin/login ALWAYS returns requires_2fa: true (never access_token directly), 2) First-time login returns needs_setup: true with qr_code and secret, 3) Returning user login returns needs_setup: false without qr_code, 4) POST /api/admin/verify-2fa activates 2FA on first use (sets totp_enabled: true), 5) Frontend correctly shows QR code setup form for first-time users and simple verify form for returning users.

backend_api_tests.POST /api/admin/login (correct credentia: ✓ Returns requires_2fa: true, temp_token (NEVER access_token directly)
backend_api_tests.POST /api/admin/login (returning user -: ✓ Returns needs_setup: false, no qr_code, no secret
backend_api_tests.POST /api/admin/forgot-password: ✓ Returns reset_code for valid admin email

frontend_ui_tests.login_page_elements: ✓ Email input, password input, 'Logga in' button, 'Glömt lösenord?' link
frontend_ui_tests.first_time_2fa_setup_form: ✓ QR code visible, manual secret option, 6-digit code input, 'Aktivera & Logga in' button
frontend_ui_tests.returning_user_verify_form: ✓ NO QR code, NO manual secret, 6-digit code input, 'Verifiera' button
frontend_ui_tests.forgot_password_form: ✓ Email input, 'Skicka återställningskod' button, 'Tillbaka till inloggning' link

verified_features.mandatory_2fa: ✓ Login NEVER returns access_token directly - always requires 2FA
verified_features.first_time_setup: ✓ QR code and secret provided for Microsoft Authenticator setup
verified_features.returning_user_flow: ✓ No QR code shown, just asks for code
